pageContext.name: Stan "The Man" Lee
pageContext.description: Excelsior!   Sideshow Art Prints and Vanderstelt Studio present the Stan The Man Lee Fine Art Print, an energetic tribute to the unforgettable pop culture trailblazer.  Artist Jerry Vanderstelt pays homage to the iconic Stan Lee in this POW-erful portrait created in honor of the comic book visionary's centennial birthday. Wearing his signature shades and a mustachioed smile, he throws out an iconic gesture as a golden spotlight casts a glow across the image. Stan The Man Lee shines on in the hearts of fans across generations, remembered for his larger-than-life personality and imaginative legacy that brings joy and hope to those in need of a hero.  Each Stan The Man Lee Fine Art Print is hand-signed by the artist and features an embossed Seal of Authenticity as a part of the limited edition of 350 pieces. This king of cameos can now make an appearance in your collection in a high-end format, available as an unframed giclée or in a custom framed presentation. Comic book fans of all ages won't want to miss a chance to bring home this officially licensed Stan Lee artwork.   And there you have it, True Believers! Add the Stan The Man Lee Fine Art Print by Jerry Vanderstelt to your collection today. 'Nuff said.
